tagline: Slide your giving. Change the world.
elevator_pitch: Charity Buck is a subscription-based charitable giving platform that lets you set a monthly donation budget, then seamlessly slide your pooled funds between vetted charities, emergency causes, and community projects with a single tap. It combines transparent charity ratings, smart fund allocation, and an emergency ambassador program so your generosity always lands where it matters most.
problem: Most people want to give to charity but face decision paralysis: thousands of organizations, unclear overhead rates, and no easy way to redirect donations when new crises emerge. The result is sporadic, guilt-driven giving or no giving at all.
solution: Charity Buck pools your daily micro-donations into a monthly fund, then lets you slide that money between curated, transparency-rated charities in seconds. When a disaster strikes or a cause catches your eye, one tap redirects your funds. No new credit card entry, no research rabbit holes, just frictionless, informed generosity.
target_market: Millennials and Gen Z earners (ages 22 to 40) who support charitable causes in principle but lack a convenient, transparent, and flexible way to donate consistently. Secondary market includes HR departments seeking employee giving programs.
revenue_model: Small monthly platform fee (e.g. $1.99/month) plus optional premium tiers for corporate matching dashboards and ambassador-level features. Additional revenue from nonprofit partnerships who pay for featured placement and analytics on donor engagement.
key_features: Slide-to-Give fund allocation that lets you redirect your pooled donations between charities with one swipe
Charity Transparency Scores showing exactly what percentage of each dollar reaches the cause
Smart Cause Groups that automatically distribute your funds across multiple vetted organizations in a single category
Ambassador Program that rewards consistent donors with the ability to nominate people in crisis for emergency grants
competitive_advantage: Unlike GoFundMe or direct charity websites, Charity Buck combines a subscription micro-donation model with real-time fund redirection, built-in transparency scoring, and a community emergency fund. The lagging-period pooling mechanism and slide-to-give UX create a switching cost that grows with each month of giving history.
market_size_estimate: U.S. charitable giving exceeded $500 billion annually. Even capturing 0.1% of individual giving (roughly $350 billion) through platform fees and partnerships represents a $350 million addressable market. The online giving segment grows 10 to 15% year over year.
go_to_market: Launch with a mobile-first app targeting socially conscious young professionals through Instagram and TikTok campaigns featuring transparent giving stories. Partner with 50 highly rated charities at launch for curated cause groups. Offer a free tier (no platform fee for the first 3 months) and referral bonuses to drive viral adoption.
risks: Regulatory complexity around holding and distributing charitable funds across state lines and maintaining nonprofit tax-deductible status
Building and maintaining accurate, up-to-date transparency scores for thousands of charities requires significant data infrastructure and editorial oversight
User acquisition cost may be high in a space where people are inherently cautious about new financial platforms handling their donations
year_one_milestones: Onboard 100 vetted charities with transparency scores and launch the mobile app on iOS and Android
Reach 10,000 active subscribers with an average monthly donation pool of $25 per user
Facilitate $2 million in total charitable donations and establish the first Ambassador emergency grant cycle
